---
name: theme-factory
title: Theme Factory
description: "Use when styling artifacts with themes — slides, docs, reports, HTML landing pages. Apply pre-set themes or generate custom themes."
---

## theme-factory

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] Environment and dependencies are properly configured
- [ ] Theme Factory output was generated successfully
- [ ] Output meets expected quality and style requirements
- [ ] Any errors during execution were resolved
- [ ] Final result is saved or delivered as expected

## Description

Toolkit for styling artifacts with a theme. Apply pre-set themes or generate custom themes for slides, docs, reports, HTML landing pages, and other artifacts.

## When to Use

- Styling presentations or slide decks
- Applying themes to documents
- Creating themed reports
- Styling HTML landing pages
- Applying consistent branding
- Customizing artifact appearance

## When NOT to Use

- Code styling (use code tools)
- Real-time collaborative editing
- Non-artifact content
- Simple text documents

## Workflow

### Phase 1: Identify Artifact

- Determine artifact type
- Review current styling
- Identify theme needs
- Plan customization

### Phase 2: Choose Theme

- Review available themes
- Select appropriate theme
- Or plan custom theme
- Verify compatibility

### Phase 3: Apply Theme

- Apply theme to artifact
- Customize colors and fonts
- Adjust styling as needed
- Test appearance

### Phase 4: Verify & Finalize

- Review themed artifact
- Ensure consistency
- Test in target environment
- Finalize and export

## Tools & References

- **Related Skills**: frontend-design, marp-slide, pptx
- **Pre-set Themes**: 10 available themes
- **Customization**: Color, font, spacing options
- **Artifacts**: Slides, docs, reports, landing pages

## Best Practices

- Use consistent theme across artifacts
- Test theme in target environment
- Maintain brand consistency
- Document theme choices
- Create reusable theme templates
- Get feedback on styling
- Archive theme configurations
